case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
